title: Updating State Correctly
description: Understand asynchronous updates and functional updates.

slides.title: State Updates May Be Asynchronous ⏳
Functional Update Example

quizData.question: State updates are always applied immediately after calling the setter function.
quizData.explanation: False. React batches updates for performance; the new state may not be available until the next render.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## When to Use Functional Updates

Whenever the new state depends on the previous state, always use the functional update form to avoid bugs.
